title: Pan Aroma Scented Tea-Lights - 12 Pack | Infused with Essential Oils | Multiple Scents (12 Pack, Cashmere & Apricot)
features: Scented Tea-lights for Every Occasion: Create a relaxing and aromatic atmosphere with Pan Aroma's Scented Tea-lights. Each pack contains 12 high-quality tea-lights designed to fill your space with delightful fragrances. Perfect for any setting—whether you're hosting a dinner, enjoying a bath, or setting the mood for a cozy night in.

Infused with Essential Oils: Our tea-lights are made using natural essential oils, ensuring that each scent brings the soothing and therapeutic benefits of aromatherapy. Whether you're looking to relax, invigorate, or meditate, these tea-lights have you covered.

Variety of Scents: Enjoy a range of exquisite fragrances from floral to fruity to woody notes. Each pack contains a selection of different scents, including Lavender, Rose, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Citrus, and many more. There's a scent for every mood and occasion.

Versatile & Compact: Our tea-lights are perfect for use in any tea-light holder, lantern, or as standalone pieces. Their small size makes them ideal for small spaces like bathrooms, bedrooms, or as decorative accents in larger rooms.
Eco-Friendly & Clean Burning: Crafted from premium quality wax, these tea-lights burn cleanly and evenly with minimal soot, making them an eco-conscious choice for your home.
description: Product description Product Specifications: Brand: Pan Aroma Pack Size: 12 Tea-lights Burn Time: Approximately 4 hours per tea-light Material: High-quality wax with natural essential oils Scents Included: Lavender, Rose, Vanilla, Sandalwood, Citrus, and more Dimensions: 3.8cm diameter per tea-light Use: Indoor/Outdoor use; perfect for aromatherapy, relaxation, and ambiance. Why Choose Pan Aroma Scented Tea-lights? Aromatherapy Benefits: Enhance your mood and well-being with the power of essential oils. Beautiful Variety: A different scent for every mood, season, and occasion. High-Quality Ingredients: Crafted from premium materials to deliver a superior burn and fragrance experience. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave burning candle unattended. Monitor burn time. Extinguish candle when 1/2 inch of wax remains. Keep out of reach of children and pets.
